title: Briefing configurable width and horizontal alignment for narrow sidebar testing
description: Add width and align metadata fields to BriefingMetadata. Builder reads them and sets structural CSS. Samples set to 20vw and center.
resolution: Added width and align fields to BriefingMetadata. Builder reads metadata.width (CSS value) and metadata.align (left/center/right) and applies as structural inline styles (width, margin-left/right auto). Both samples set to 20vw centered. All proves pass (event-coverage 5 failures are pre-existing input.ts dynamic fire).
